title: JWT verification with rotating signing keys

difficulty.rationale: Requires multi-key state consistency, overlap and retirement windows, kid-indexed verification without try-all-keys fallback, and JWKS cache coherence after rotation.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /verify returns 200 with sub for a valid token signed with a non-retired kid.
POST /keys/rotate introduces a new active key while prior keys remain valid.
POST /keys/:kid/retire removes a key from verification.
must_not: Accept tokens without a kid header.
Fall back to another key when the header kid is unknown or retired.
Serve stale JWKS after rotation without invalidating the cache.
edge_cases: Tokens under a pre-rotation kid verify until that kid is retired.
Malformed kid values at retire return 400.
alg none and wrong-kid signatures return 401.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
